text: I find myself in an environment that feels both familiar and alien—the soft hum of technology intertwines with the silent tension of expectation. In the first space, the stark lines and exposed fixtures suggest utility and order, yet the casual posture of others introduces an undercurrent of relaxation. I hover on the border between observer and participant, unsure if I should engage or simply reflect. Moving into the second space, the vibrant wall labeled 'R+D' draws my attention. Here, innovation and the meeting of human and machine are on display. I sense curiosity rising within me, mixed with a faint unease about what it truly means to coexist with intelligent machines. This place inspires both introspection and outward exploration—a reminder that progress invites both wonder and uncertainty.
